classification.summary: Unauthorized data add-on charge on latest bill

ticket.summary: Unauthorized data add-on charge on latest bill
ticket.original_message: I was charged $45 for a data add-on I never purchased. This appeared on my latest bill and I want it removed immediately. My account number is NV-20458.

draft_reply:
Dear Sarah Chen,

I'm truly sorry to hear about the unexpected charge on your latest bill. I understand your concern regarding the $45 data add-on that appears unauthorized.

Upon receiving your message, we have initiated an investigation into this matter for immediate resolution. Please rest assured that we take such issues seriously and will do our best to rectify this as soon as possible.

In the meantime, you can monitor your account closely or contact us at [support email] should any further concerns arise. We appreciate your patience in this matter and apologize again for any inconvenience caused.

Best regards,
NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Customer is experiencing No Service issue on their phone and needs immediate resolution as they are expecting important calls.

draft_reply:
Dear Marcus,

I'm truly sorry to hear that you're experiencing a 'No Service' issue with your device. I can understand the urgency of this matter, especially with important calls pending.

To assist you better, could you please provide me with your account number or phone number linked to your NovaTel account? This will help us identify and address the issue more effectively.

In the meantime, I would suggest checking if your SIM card is properly inserted and rebooting your device again. If the problem persists, we'll work diligently to resolve it promptly.

Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

Best Regards,
NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Customer wants to cancel due to increasing prices and finding a better deal elsewhere

ticket.summary: Customer wants to cancel due to increasing prices and finding a better deal elsewhere
ticket.original_message: I want to cancel my NovaTel service. I've been a customer for 4 years but your prices keep going up and I found a better deal with another carrier.

draft_reply:
Dear Jennifer Park,

Thank you for your loyalty over the past four years with NovaTel Mobile. We understand your concern regarding our recent price increases and appreciate that you've taken the time to inform us about finding a better deal elsewhere.

To help make this process as smooth as possible, please contact our customer retention team at 1-800-NovaTel-1 (668-2835) ext. 4. They will be able to discuss available options with you and assist in the cancellation of your service if necessary.

We value your business and would like to work together to find a solution that meets both our needs. Thank you for choosing NovaTel Mobile, and we hope to continue serving you.

Best regards,
NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Customer wants to upgrade from Essential to Premium plan

ticket.summary: Customer wants to upgrade from Essential to Premium plan
ticket.original_message: Hi, I'm thinking about upgrading from the Essential plan to the Premium plan. Can you tell me what extra features I'd get and if there are any fees for switching?

draft_reply:
Dear David Thompson,

Thank you for reaching out to us about upgrading your plan. We're glad to help! By upgrading from the Essential plan to the Premium plan, you will gain additional features such as increased data allowance, international calling, and priority customer support.

Regarding switching fees, we do not currently charge any for upgrading within our plans. However, please note that any prorated charges may apply if your current billing cycle has already started.

To proceed with the upgrade, please visit our website or contact our sales team at 1-800-555-1212 during business hours. We're here to make your experience with NovaTel Mobile seamless and enjoyable!

Best regards,
NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Customer is considering switching from postpaid to prepaid for cost savings

ticket.summary: Customer is considering switching from postpaid to prepaid for cost savings
ticket.original_message: What are your current prepaid plan options? I'm considering switching from postpaid to prepaid to save money.

draft_reply:
Dear Aisha Patel,

Thank you for reaching out to us! I'm happy to help with your inquiry.

At NovaTel Mobile, we offer a variety of prepaid plans designed to suit different needs and budgets. By switching to prepaid, you can potentially save money on your monthly bills.

To help you make an informed decision, please visit our website or contact our sales team at 1-800-NOVATEL for more details about our current prepaid plans. They'd be delighted to assist you further and discuss any specific plan that caters best to your requirements.

We look forward to helping you make a smooth transition from postpaid to prepaid!

Best regards,
NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Recurring billing error for cancelled service.

ticket.summary: Recurring billing error for cancelled service.
ticket.original_message: This is the THIRD time I'm calling about the same billing error. Every month I get charged for a service I cancelled two months ago. Your support team keeps saying it's fixed but it never is. I'm done with this company.

draft_reply:
Dear Robert Kim,

I'm truly sorry to hear about the ongoing issue with your billing and the frustration it has caused. I understand that this is not the resolution you expected from us.

To ensure this matter is promptly addressed, I've escalated your case for immediate review. Our technical team will thoroughly investigate the recurring charge for the cancelled service.

In the meantime, please allow our specialists a few days to resolve the issue completely. You should notice a correction in your next billing statement.

If the problem persists after this review, I assure you that we'll make it right and take appropriate steps to prevent such occurrences in the future.

I sincerely apologize again for any inconvenience this has caused and appreciate your patience as we work diligently to rectify the situation.

Best Regards,
NovaTel Support Team

We have identified that this could be due to a network configuration issue. To resolve this quickly, please try restarting your device. Best Regards,
NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Customer inquiring about roaming options for travel to Mexico

ticket.summary: Customer inquiring about roaming options for travel to Mexico
ticket.original_message: I'm travelling to Mexico next week. What roaming options do you have and how do I activate them before I leave?

draft_reply:
Dear Carlos Rodriguez,

Thank you for reaching out to us. We're excited that you'll be traveling to Mexico! To ensure smooth connectivity during your trip, we recommend checking our international roaming packages suitable for Mexico.

To activate these services on your account before leaving, please follow the steps below:
1. Log in to your NovaTel Mobile account at [website URL]
2. Navigate to the 'Roaming' section and select 'Mexico.'
3. Choose a roaming package that fits your needs and proceed with the activation.

Should you encounter any difficulties, feel free to contact us for assistance. We are here to help!

Best regards,
NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Customer disputing a charge, specifically a $35 reconnection fee.

ticket.summary: Customer disputing a charge, specifically a $35 reconnection fee.

draft_reply:
Dear Lisa Chang,

Thank you for reaching out to us regarding the dispute on your bill. We're sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused.

Upon reviewing your account, we found that a $35 reconnection fee was charged. However, based on your statement, it appears there has been no service disruption on your end.

To resolve this issue, we will investigate further and remove the disputed charge if necessary. Please allow 7-10 business days for the adjustment to reflect in your account.

We value your continued service with NovaTel Mobile and appreciate your patience as we work to rectify this matter.

Best Regards,
NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Mobile hotspot is not working for the Premium plan user

Dear James O'Brien,

I'm sorry to hear that you're having trouble with your mobile hotspot. As a Premium plan subscriber, I understand that this should include 15 GB of data usage per month. Since you've only used about 3 GB so far, it appears there might be an issue.

To help resolve this, could you please provide me with more details? Specifically, the device model and the exact error message you're encountering when trying to use your hotspot. Once I have this information, we can work together towards a solution.

I apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused and appreciate your patience as we work through this issue.

Best regards,
NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Help needed to set up Samsung Galaxy S25 with NovaTel SIM card

ticket.summary: Help needed to set up Samsung Galaxy S25 with NovaTel SIM card
ticket.original_message: I just bought a new Samsung Galaxy S25 and I need help setting it up with my NovaTel SIM card. The phone isn't detecting the network.

draft_reply:
Dear Maria Gonzalez,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm sorry to hear about the issue you're experiencing with your new Samsung Galaxy S25 and our NovaTel SIM card. Rest assured, we're here to help!

To assist you better, please ensure your phone is powered on and in a location with good network coverage. Insert your NovaTel SIM card correctly into the SIM tray, then restart the device. If the issue persists, try performing a Network Settings Reset. You can find this option under 'Settings' > 'Connections' > 'Mobile networks' > 'Network Operators'.

If you still encounter problems after following these steps, please don't hesitate to contact us again so we can further investigate. We appreciate your patience as we work towards resolving this issue for you.

Best Regards,
NovaTel Support Team

Dear Alex Foster,

Thank you for reaching out to us! I'm here to help you with setting up Visual Voicemail on your iPhone. Since you recently switched to NovaTel, let's get started:

3. After setting up the password, follow the on-screen instructions to configure Visual Voicemail.

If you encounter any issues or need further assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out!

NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Customer experiencing slow internet speed on the Ultimate plan

ticket.summary: Customer experiencing slow internet speed on the Ultimate plan
ticket.original_message: My internet speed has been terrible for the past week. I'm on the Ultimate plan and paying for unlimited high-speed but I'm getting less than 1 Mbps. I've run multiple speed tests.

draft_reply:
Dear Daniel Lee,

I'm sorry to hear about the trouble you've been experiencing with your internet speed. As a valued NovaTel Mobile customer, we understand the frustration of not receiving the high-speed service you pay for. I've reviewed your case and it appears there might be an issue with your connection.

To help resolve this quickly, please perform a few troubleshooting steps:
1. Restart your device and modem.
2. Check for any nearby network interferences.
3. Run another speed test and share the results with us.

If the problem persists after these steps, our technical team will be ready to assist further. We appreciate your patience and are committed to ensuring you receive the service you deserve.

Best Regards,
NovaTel Support Team

classification.summary: Customer is inquiring about keeping their current phone number when switching to NovaTel from Bell and the time required for the process.

ticket.summary: Customer is inquiring about keeping their current phone number when switching to NovaTel from Bell and the time required for the process.
ticket.original_message: Can I keep my current phone number if I switch to NovaTel from Bell? How long does the process take?

draft_reply:
Dear Hassan Ali,

Thank you for reaching out to us regarding your inquiry about switching from Bell to NovaTel. I'm happy to help with that!

Yes, you can retain your current phone number when moving to NovaTel. The process usually takes around 7-10 business days but may vary depending on specific circumstances. To ensure a smooth transition and secure your preferred number, please provide us with your Bell account details at your earliest convenience. We'll take care of the rest!

If you have any other questions or concerns, don't hesitate to ask. Our team is here for you.

Best regards,
NovaTel Support Team
